Finding: SMBv1 protocol enabled on file server (legacy
Date Resolved: Disabled SMBv1 server-side; verified only SMBv2/3 negotiated by test clients

Finding: Outdated OpenSSL version with known CVE on web-facing host
Remediation: Updated OpenSSL package and rebuilt reverse proxy container; re-scanned to confirm patched version

Finding: RDP exposed to lab network with weak account lockout policy
Remediation: Restricted RDP to management subnet via firewall rule; enforced account lockout after 5 failed attempts

Finding: Missing security patches (multiple KBs) on Windows Server
Remediation: Applied pending Windows Updates during scheduled maintenance window; verified via follow-up scan

Finding: Self-signed SSL certificate on internal WordPress admin panel
Remediation: Requested internal CA-signed certificate; interim mitigation is IP allowlisting for /wp-admin
